title: Blinko RCE
summary: [P1] Blinko is an AI-powered card note-taking project with multiple vulnerabilities, including CVE-2026-23484, CVE-2026-23481, and CVE-2026-23482, which can be exploited for remote code execution. No patches are currently available for these vulnerabilities. Why now: These vulnerabilities are particularly concerning due to the lack of available patches and the potential for remote code execution. (confidence: 0.80)
